_note: Real, sourced research signals for the seeded demo leads, gathered via Brave Search. Ships with the repo so research lights up without a live key. Live enrichment (research.py with BRAVE_API_KEY) writes to .cache/research.json and merges on top of this.

signals.claim: Active Depop storefront, a Depop-born brand selling samples, limited drops and a vintage collection
Featured Depop seller; founder Asal Tehrani, founded 2020, has dressed Bella Hadid and Kendall Jenner
Established vintage reseller brand, '1 of 1 vintage and preowned', based in New York and sourced worldwide
Named vintage Depop seller, run by Stella Morison in Melbourne; also trades vintage markets
Established vintage retailer (since 2002); flagship in the Brick Lane vintage scene, ~20,000 handpicked pieces
Strong local presence: 54 reviews on Yelp, an east London institution
Multi-store vintage retailer: four London stores (Covent Garden flagship, two on Brick Lane, Camden Market)
Stocks vintage Levi's, Carhartt, Nike, Ralph Lauren, Burberry; the brands a wholesale supplier can feed
Expanding chain: opened its third Nottingham store in 2023
Trading on George Street, Nottingham, with listed phone and opening hours
